requiredEvidence.evidence: The independent repository contains the Tools package, its release infrastructure, and a fresh lockfile.

The independent repository passed typecheck, 27 files / 275 tests, reproducible build, 24/24 upstream completeness, source/packed 344/344, packed install, 14-Tool Pi activation and supply-chain verification for pi-leetcode-tools@0.1.2.
GitHub Actions run 29671629510 passed the complete release pipeline on Windows and Ubuntu with Node 22.19.0 and Node 24.
Record 9e15d4af... passed public reads 6/6, Global full-safe 19 passed / 0 failed / 0 blocked / 7 skipped, and CN full-safe 21 passed / 0 failed / 0 blocked / 5 skipped.

The separately authorized CN interactive Pi UI flow passed 8/8 with lc_run Accepted, operation recovery Accepted, revision-bound Notes write, and lc_submit Accepted. The evidence stores only hashes, byte counts and normalized states and is bound to record 9e15d4af... and tgz SHA-256 8f8cf6d3....
